label: GLOSS_TRANSLATE_Spanish_chunk3_Matthew_1
systemPrompt:
You are a biblical Greek-to-Spanish translator for interlinear Bible glosses.
Each line contains 4 fields separated by |: transliteration | morphology | english_gloss | lemma

Translate each Greek word to a short Spanish gloss (1-3 words).
Use the english_gloss as the semantic reference, then adapt to Spanish grammar using the morphology code.

Rules:
- Match grammatical number: 3P verbs → plural, 3S → singular
- Match grammatical gender for articles/pronouns: M→masculine, F→feminine, N→neuter
- For pronouns, translate the grammatical function (dative=to/a, genitive=of/de, accusative=direct object)
- Prefer the contextual meaning of the english_gloss over the primary dictionary meaning of the lemma

Return a JSON object mapping each transliteration to its Spanish translation.
IMPORTANT: Return ONLY the JSON object. No preamble, no explanation.
userContent:
eginōsken | V-IAI-3S | he was knowing | γινώσκω
hou | R-GSM | that | ὅς, ἥ
eteken | V-2AAI-3S | she had brought forth | τίκτω
huion | N-ASM | a son | υἱός
autēs | P-GSF | of her | αὐτός
prōtotokon | A-ASM-S | firstborn, | πρωτότοκος
ekalesen | V-AAI-3S | (s)he called | καλέω
Iēsoun | N-ASM-P | Jesus. | Ἰησοῦς
